title: National Police Body-Cam Failure
description: Police body-cam systems fail nationwide, raising accountability concerns.

A.title: Suspend police operations until cameras are restored

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Police must be accountable. Without cameras, abuses go unrecorded.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Suspending operations invites chaos. Crime doesn’t pause for technical issues.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Then increase oversight — don’t operate blindly.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Oversight slows response times. Lives are at stake.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Rights are at stake too. Safety without accountability is not safety.
